name: Consolidated Funding, Inc.
description_short: Consolidated Funding, Inc. is a credit repair provider based in North Miami Beach, Florida. Rated 4.1/5 with 14 Google reviews, reflecting strong customer satisfaction.
description_long:
Consolidated Funding, Inc. is a credit repair provider serving clients in North Miami Beach, Florida. Carrying a 4.1/5.0 Google rating from 14 reviews, Consolidated Funding, Inc. has an strong reputation among consumers in the North Miami Beach area looking to repair and improve their credit scores.

Consolidated Funding, Inc. specializes in credit repair services designed to help consumers repair and improve their credit scores. Additional information about their services and processes can typically be found on their website.

When evaluating credit repair services in North Miami Beach, consumers should look for providers that dispute directly with all three credit bureaus — Equifax, Experian, and TransUnion. Key differentiators include transparency around pricing, realistic timelines for results, and whether the company offers a money-back guarantee. Consolidated Funding, Inc. operates in a highly regulated industry under the Credit Repair Organizations Act (CROA), which requires written contracts, a three-day cancellation window, and prohibits upfront fees before services are rendered.

Consumers in the North Miami Beach, Florida area who are considering Consolidated Funding, Inc. should contact the company directly to discuss their specific situation and get current pricing information. As with any credit repair provider, it is advisable to compare multiple options, verify licensing and credentials, and read recent customer reviews before making a decision.
